name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures ability to understand and work with numerical data, interpret graphs, tables, and statistics to make decisions.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to understand written information and draw logical conclusions. Suitable for roles requiring strong communication.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to identify patterns and relationships in abstract information. Predicts general cognitive ability.

name: OPQ32 Personality Questionnaire
description: Comprehensive occupational personality questionnaire measuring 32 personality characteristics relevant to workplace performance.

name: Coding Pro - Python
description: Technical assessment for Python developers covering algorithms, data structures, OOP, and real-world coding problems.

name: Coding Pro - Java
description: Technical coding assessment for Java developers covering OOP concepts, Spring, multithreading, and enterprise patterns.

name: Situational Judgement Test - Leadership
description: Presents realistic workplace scenarios to assess judgment in leadership contexts including team management, conflict resolution and decision-making.

name: Situational Judgement Test - Customer Service
description: Assesses how candidates handle customer-facing situations, measuring empathy, problem solving and service orientation.

name: Sales Assessment Battery
description: Comprehensive assessment combining personality, ability and situational judgement specifically designed for sales roles.

name: Graduate Assessment Battery
description: Tailored for graduate recruitment, combining numerical, verbal and inductive reasoning with a personality component.

name: Verify Interactive - Data Entry
description: Simulates real data entry tasks to measure speed and accuracy in processing structured information.

name: Motivational Questionnaire
description: Identifies what motivates candidates at work across 18 key factors, helping match candidates to the right environment.

name: Verify Mechanical Comprehension
description: Measures understanding of mechanical concepts and physical principles. Ideal for engineering and technical roles.

name: Coding Pro - JavaScript
description: Evaluates JavaScript and frontend/full-stack skills including DOM manipulation, async programming, and modern frameworks.

name: 360 Degree Feedback Tool
description: Collects structured feedback from peers, managers and direct reports to provide a comprehensive view of leadership effectiveness.
